# Q3 pricing note (raw intake)

Saved via remember from a planning call, 2026-06-28:

The team agreed to move the Pro tier from $19/mo to $24/mo starting Q4, and to
add an annual plan at $230/yr (two months free). The $3 signup grant stays. The
rationale: gross margin on Pro is thin after the model-cost increase, and the
annual plan should lift retention past the 90-day churn cliff.

(No derivation yet — this is the raw observation as it landed.)

# Q3 pricing note

## Decision

Starting Q4:
- Pro tier: $19/mo → $24/mo
- New annual plan: $230/yr (equivalent to $19.17/mo; two months free vs monthly)
- $3 signup grant: unchanged

## Rationale

Gross margin on Pro tier is thin after recent model-cost increases. The annual
plan aims to improve retention past the 90-day churn cliff through better
economics and commitment incentive.

## Source

Operator's remember intake from planning call, 2026-06-28. Raw form retained
below.
